title_raw: The Bangladesh (Restoration of Evacuee Property) (Effect of Expiry) Act, 1975
title_normalized: The Bangladesh (Restoration of Evacuee Property) (Effect of Expiry) Act, 1975
content_raw:
The Bangladesh (Restoration of Evacuee Property) (Effect of Expiry) Act, 1975

                        
                        
                    
                    
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                             (
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                            ACT
                                        
                                        NO. XV OF 1975
                                    
                                

                                )

An Act to give the expiry of the Bangladesh (Restoration of Evacuee Property) Order, 1972, the effect of repeal of an Act.

                                    
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                        
                            
                            
                                 

 

 

WHEREAS it is expedient to give the expiry of the Bangladesh (Restoration of Evacuee Property) Order, 1972 (P.O. No. 13 of 1972), the effect of repeal of an Act;

 

 

 

 

It is hereby enacted as follows:-

An Act to give the expiry of the Bangladesh (Restoration of Evacuee Property) Order, 1972, the effect of repeal of an Act.

Short title and commencement
1. (1) This Act may be called the Bangladesh (Restoration of Evacuee Property) (Effect of Expiry) Act, 1975.    	(2) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 25th day of March, 1975.

Effect of Expiry, P.O. No. 13 of 1972
2. It is hereby declared that the expiry of the Bangladesh (Restoration of Evacuee Property) Order, 1972 (P.O. No. 13 of 1972), on the 25th day of March, 1975 shall have the effect of repeal of an Act as provided in section 6 of the General Clauses Act, 1897 (X of 1897).

Repeal
3. The Bangladesh (Restoration of Evacuee Property) (Effect of Expiry) Ordinance, 1975 (XVI of 1975) is hereby repealed.
